2140900.name: The Unluckiest Man
2140900.description:
Before playing The Unluckiest Man, check this amazing new project which I am working on!
Explore spine-tingling psychologica horrors in my upcoming game as we journey into the 1940s.





Immerse yourself in the dark tragic-comic adventure of "The Unluckiest Man", a short free narrative experience with light puzzle elements.

Play as Dragomir, a widower who has just lost his beloved wife after a long suffering caused by tuberculosis. Following her death, Dragomir is struggling, having to prepare Catrina's funeral while being completely broke and with no one to help him.



  • Explore your dilapidated house as well as the rest of the fishing town in first person mode, while trying to make sense of the uncomfortable situation you find yourself in.
  • Find keys, collect various items and solve light puzzles to progress the story.
  • Notes are spread around, revealing more about your past and hinting at your future.
  • Talk to the townsfolk and see if they are willing to help you or at least show a bit of compassion.
  • Read the newspaper to delight in some of the city's most exciting gossip.
  • Set in Romania, the game features Romanian voice acting with English subtitles.
  • Check your inventory to see your collected items and read your found notes and newspaper articles.
